caption: A man wearing a light-blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone is positioned in front of a plain, light-colored wall. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth open and eyes focused forward. In the initial moments, he gestures with both hands raised and palms open to emphasize his speech. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his arms and brings them out of view, focusing solely on speaking into the microphone. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle stays fixed in a medium close-up, capturing him from the chest up. No other people or objects are visible in the setting.
